target: 8. To the Harbor
Shinpei still seems to doubt me, huh?
Yeah... it's a shame, though.
I see...
Shin-chan, why!?
(There was just something unnatural about Alain's story.)
(I understand that Mio wants to believe Alain, and if possible, I'd like to believe him too.)
Shin-chan!
(But if the result of that choice leads to a future where Mio is put in danger, then I'll gladly play the bad guy.)
(Protect Mio... That was Ushio's wish.)
At any rate, escaping the island is our top priority right now.
I'll go on ahead. Shinpei would probably prefer that.
Why can't you believe in Dad, Shin-chan?
Wait, Dad! I'll go with you!
Hey, Mio! I said don't wander off!
We repeat. Currently, a disaster of unknown cause has occurred, centered around Hitogashima Shrine.
Those who wish to evacuate to the mainland, please board the temporary ferry that has arrived.
*Pant, pant*... Looks like we made it in time.
What is this? Where were all these people?
There wasn't anyone here when we came earlier...
Everyone must have been hiding with bated breath all over the island.
Looks like there will be more temporary ferries after this. At this rate, everyone should be able to evacuate.
Mio! Shinpei-san!
Tokiko!?
Sou, you're safe too!
I'm glad you're safe too!
We were worried, you know! I tried calling but it wouldn't connect!
Huh...? Wait a sec, you called!?
That's my line! You guys didn't answer your phones, and you didn't reply to my emails either!
Hah!? As if! We were--
Just be quiet, Sou. I'll explain.
O-Oh.
Shinpei-san, the reason the calls wouldn't connect was probably due to radio interference.
Radio interference...?
Apparently the reception has been acting up across the whole island. That's what other people were saying.
It might be related to that commotion at the shrine... But that's strictly my personal guess.
Is that so...
But I'm glad. That we were all able to gather here safely like this.
Anyway, Alain-san was with you too, huh. Did you guys go pick him up?
A-Ah, well...
We were thinking the exact same thing! Tokiko and I were worried about our mom and the others, so we went back home for a bit too.
Huh? Then where are your mom and Hishigata-sensei?
Aren't they with you guys?
They're already on the boat. We were waiting here for you and Mio to show up.
You guys definitely made the right call going to get Alain-san.
Apparently, there are some scumbags taking advantage of this commotion to commit burglaries.
Burglaries?
Yes. It seems there were some people who came to the island aiming for the opening when everyone was out at the festival.
To be stealing while that monster is roaming around... They've got some nerve.
Seriously. The world's become a dangerous place.
(Then what Alain said was...?)
Shin-chan, we can believe what Dad said earlier, right?
Y-Yeah...

Are you okay, Shinpei?
You look really exhausted.
It's not that I'm exhausted, it's just... After being so tense for so long, the sudden relief is hitting me hard.
Once I realized everyone was safe and felt relieved, I suddenly got super sleepy.
You've been through a lot. Good work.
Shin-chan, it's too early to sleep. At least wait until we're on the boat!
Hey, you over there! Stop chatting and hurry up and board!
Ah, right!
Here, the exhausted Shin-chan can sit and sleep right here.
Ah, wait, wait. I want you to tell me a little bit about what happened before you sleep.
I was wondering what you two had been up to since we got separated.
Hehe... We really have been through a lot, haven't we. Right, Shin-chan?
What's that supposed to mean? Saying it so suggestively like that.
H-Hey, Shinpei! Did something happen between you and Mio-chan while you were escaping!?
N-Nothing happened!
Thank you for waiting. We will now be departing.
(Well, we're safe for now...)
(There are still a mountain of things I need to think about regarding what to do next.)
(But until this boat reaches the mainland... It's okay for me to just rest without thinking about anything, right...)
(Crap... I actually fell asleep before I knew it.)
...Huh?
(There's no one around? Where did everyone go?)
(Even the other passengers... There should have been so many of them!)
Mio, Alain, are you there?
Sou? Toki-chan?
(This feeling... is a Shadow approaching? But from where!?)
(Shadows are on the boat... They're crawling up from the sea!)
(My assumption that Shadows couldn't cross rivers and seas was completely wrong!)
(To think the Shadows have reached this far out to sea! Could they even reach the mainland!?)
(Where is this boat right now...?)
Ah…
(The island... is covered in Shadows...?)
(No, wait! Why is the island so close!?)
(Could it be... this boat is heading back? Why!?)
(Anyway, I have to get them to move the boat away from the island!)
Captain!! Please head the boat out to sea!
Are you listening, Captain! Hurry up and get away from those Shadows!
Those Shadows swallow people! At this rate, this entire boat could be swallowed up!
Yes, I know.
Huh…?
We meet again.
Y-You're...!?
(This guy, the four-armed one from the shrine grounds! Why is he on the boat--)
Shi~n-chan.
M-Mio…
Aw man, why did you have to wake up.
If you had just stayed asleep, it would have all ended without you suffering at all.
E-Ended...?
Dad, Tokiko, Sou-kun, they've all gone on ahead and are waiting for you.
You need to hurry and go too, Shin-chan.
